Mobile Layout (Force)
Developer Console

World Content And Asset Registry

Browse the database by category, inspect the latest or oldest records, and create story, image, audio, and gameplay entries from one place.

Asset Library Map Editor Sheet Slicer Audio Intake Terrain Recipes
Quick Start
Add one record at a time. Use `AI To DB` for rough notes, then verify the JSON before saving.
  • `Asset Library` for original files
  • `Sheet Slicer` for sprite sheets and atlases
  • `Terrain Recipes` for map-generation bindings
Dev Access
Checking whether this panel requires a key...
Browse Order
Choose whether each category shows the latest or oldest records first.
AI Config
Configure the provider used by the in-game AI tooling and content generation flows.
Categories
Switch between gameplay data, story, assets, and player-state records.
Category

Loading category...

Pulling current database records...

...
Record Editor

Edit Record

Review the JSON and save it back into the selected source.

AI Draft

Paste free text, lore notes, or design instructions. AI will map it into the JSON shape for this database source.

World Override Builder

Choose a world, pick the patch target, and seed a safe override payload without writing the whole JSON structure by hand.

Selection
World Layout
Select a node or path to edit it, or use Add Path to connect two nodes.
Layout
Node
Path
